programme.title: NBC Today
programme.desc: International news and weather including interviews with newsmakers in the world of politics, business, media, entertainment and sport.

programme.title: Better Homes And Gardens
programme.desc: Joh meets a husband and wife team renovating caravans with some style; Karen makes chocolate salted self-saucing pudding; Adam builds a set of shelves perfect for your kid's bedroom.

programme.title: Escape To The Country
programme.desc: Today's couple want to spend their retirement in the peace and quiet of the Scottish borders and Alistair Appleton is on hand to help them find the perfect pad for their 350k budget.

programme.title: Creek To Coast
programme.desc: We're on the fairway with Lions favourite, Cam Rayner. Braving the rain for a flathead bonanza. Australia's best Hipcamp and cooking up the crispiest campfire potatoes you've ever tasted.

programme.title: House Of Wellness
programme.desc: Join Mel Doyle and Shane Crawford where no topic is off limits from mental health, innovations in health, treatments for common illnesses, natural medicines, and explorations into food.

programme.title: Harry's Practice
programme.desc: Join Dr Harry Cooper and Dr Katrina Warren for everything you need to know about animals.

programme.title: Medical Rookies
programme.desc: Meet the young medical trainees at Westmead Hospital, Australia's biggest teaching hospital. Hosted by JENNIFER KEYTE.

programme.title: Better Homes And Gardens
programme.desc: Joh meets a husband and wife team renovating caravans with some style; Karen makes chocolate salted self-saucing pudding; Adam builds a set of shelves perfect for your kid's bedroom.

programme.title: Escape To The Country
programme.desc: Surrounded by concrete and noisy traffic, most city people are tempted to quit the rat-race for the peace of the countryside. In this series, experts Jules Hudson, Alistair Appleton, Aled Jones and Denise Nurse help people to achieve that dream, finding property with potential and guiding prospective buyers through every aspect of buying, selling and moving.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Join Natasha Raskin Sharp from Worcester. The teams battle it out with expert help from Thomas Forrester and Tim Weeks before heading to the auction in Staffordshire. Natasha also visits a rare collection of Traveller caravans.

programme.title: Call The Midwife
programme.desc: A spate of violent attacks on women brings a state of fear to Poplar. A secret pregnancy threatens the life of a young girl after her mother takes matters into her own hands.

programme.title: Inspector Morse: The Dead Of Jericho
programme.desc: Morse investigates five ruthless, gruesome killings in and around a quiet country church with the help of the church cleaner, to whom he becomes attracted.

programme.title: Escape To The Country
programme.desc: Surrounded by concrete and noisy traffic, most city people are tempted to quit the rat-race for the peace of the countryside. In this series, experts Jules Hudson, Alistair Appleton, Aled Jones and Denise Nurse help people to achieve that dream, finding property with potential and guiding prospective buyers through every aspect of buying, selling and moving.

programme.title: Showtrial
programme.desc: Cleo puts pressure on the police case as Talitha threatens to slip from Cassidy's grasp, but a surprise arrest of a third suspect offers a new theory about what happened to Hannah.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Join Natasha Raskin Sharp from Worcester. The teams battle it out with expert help from Thomas Forrester and Tim Weeks before heading to the auction in Staffordshire. Natasha also visits a rare collection of Traveller caravans.

programme.title: Harry's Practice
programme.desc: Join Dr Harry Cooper and Dr Katrina Warren for everything you need to know about animals.

programme.title: Medical Rookies
programme.desc: Meet the young medical trainees at Westmead Hospital, Australia's biggest teaching hospital. Hosted by JENNIFER KEYTE.

programme.title: Better Homes And Gardens
programme.desc: Joh meets a husband and wife team renovating caravans with some style; Karen makes chocolate salted self-saucing pudding; Adam builds a set of shelves perfect for your kid's bedroom.

programme.title: Million Dollar Minute
programme.desc: Million Dollar Minute is a battle of general knowledge, where every correct answer is a step closer to the ultimate test: Can one person, in one minute, win one million dollars?

programme.title: Million Dollar Minute
programme.desc: Million Dollar Minute is a battle of general knowledge, where every correct answer is a step closer to the ultimate test: Can one person, in one minute, win one million dollars?

programme.title: Surf Patrol
programme.desc: Lifesavers respond to reports of a peeping tom in a toilet block. Then, a teenage beachgoer is reported missing.

programme.title: Our Town
programme.desc: A look at various Australian destinations to see why people should visit, live, work, play and invest locally, both regionally and in metropolitan regions.

programme.title: Australia's Deadliest
programme.desc: A young woman is viciously mauled by a great white shark, while a man's holiday is cut short when he is bitten by a deadly brown snake and a young boy goes into anaphylactic shock from an ant bite.

programme.title: Escape To The Country
programme.desc: Surrounded by concrete and noisy traffic, most city people are tempted to quit the rat-race for the peace of the countryside. In this series, experts Jules Hudson, Alistair Appleton, Aled Jones and Denise Nurse help people to achieve that dream, finding property with potential and guiding prospective buyers through every aspect of buying, selling and moving.

programme.title: Harry's Practice
programme.desc: Join Dr Harry Cooper and Dr Katrina Warren for everything you need to know about animals.

programme.title: Million Dollar Minute
programme.desc: Million Dollar Minute is a battle of general knowledge, where every correct answer is a step closer to the ultimate test: Can one person, in one minute, win one million dollars?

programme.title: Million Dollar Minute
programme.desc: Million Dollar Minute is a battle of general knowledge, where every correct answer is a step closer to the ultimate test: Can one person, in one minute, win one million dollars?

programme.title: Kochie's Business Builders
programme.desc: Online vet platform Your Vet Online is already helping thousands of pet owners get expert advice without leaving home. Founder Dr Leigh Davidson is launching a new consumer-facing brand, Pet Matters.

programme.title: NBC Today
programme.desc: International news and weather including interviews with newsmakers in the world of politics, business, media, entertainment and sport.

programme.title: My Reno Rules
programme.desc: The stakes skyrocket as Adrian Portelli drops a huge announcement to turn the competition on its head. Teams race to finish, driven by the desire to win big, but the judges are in for a mixed bag.

programme.title: Sydney Weekender
programme.desc: Mel gets an exclusive look at the restoration of our most historic ships, Luke visits Griffith to taste their culture, and Sally catches up with Somer to celebrate a decade of deliciousness at Anason.

programme.title: House Calls To The Rescue
programme.desc: The team rescues a couple suffering a giant hangover from a garden clean-up gone wrong, plus the businessman who runs his company from a linen closet, and the laundry with no door.

programme.title: Harry's Practice
programme.desc: Join Dr Harry Cooper and Dr Katrina Warren for everything you need to know about animals.

programme.title: RSPCA Animal Rescue
programme.desc: A cat saved by the RSPCA is reunited with its owners after being missing for two years and a Labrador puppy is rescued just in the nick of time.

programme.title: Better Homes And Gardens
programme.desc: Joh and Graham check out a sustainable low-budget family home, surrounded by a lush garden. Adam shows you how to fix two common kitchen issues. Ed makes salmon gado gado.

programme.title: Escape To The Country
programme.desc: Looking to put their family first, Ginny Buckley takes a couple from Harrogate on a property search in Gloucestershire with a budget of 650,000 pounds.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Join Christina Trevanion for this edition of Bargain Hunt from Wales. Experts Philip Serrell and Kate Bliss guide their teams as they pick three items to take to auction in Cardiff. Christina has a music lesson in one of Pembrokeshire's finest stately homes, Picton Castle.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: The County Sheepdog Trials take place at Ashfordly Hall, and it soon becomes clear that even such a prestigious event can bring out the worst in some people. Meanwhile, Vernon tries to cash in by organising the toilet facilities for the event - but his money-making dreams soon go down the pan.

programme.title: McDonald And Dodds
programme.desc: The detectives investigate when the body of a successful Bath businessman is found in a shallow grave in the shadow of Glastonbury Tor on the dawn of All Soul's Day. Their first suspect is local artist Hector Ingham, although McDonald can't help but be suspicious of the man who found the body. As increasingly cryptic clues come to light, one name keeps reoccurring in paper trails, credit card statement and on the lips of witnesses - that of Dodds himself.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigations
programme.desc: Ethiopian Airlines Flight 302 nosedives after takeoff from Addis Ababa, killing everyone on board. This is the second fatal accident involving the Boeing 737 MAX 8 in just five months. When investigators conclude the same piece of software caused the plane to pitch down repeatedly in both accidents, the entire MAX 8 fleet is grounded until a fix can be found.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Join Christina Trevanion for this edition of Bargain Hunt from Wales. Experts Philip Serrell and Kate Bliss guide their teams as they pick three items to take to auction in Cardiff. Christina has a music lesson in one of Pembrokeshire's finest stately homes, Picton Castle.

programme.desc: A look at various Australian destinations to see why people should visit, live, work, play and invest locally, both regionally and in metropolitan regions.

programme.desc: A young woman is viciously mauled by a great white shark, while a man's holiday is cut short when he is bitten by a deadly brown snake and a young boy goes into anaphylactic shock from an ant bite.

programme.desc: Joh and Graham check out a sustainable low-budget family home, surrounded by a lush garden. Adam shows you how to fix two common kitchen issues. Ed makes salmon gado gado.

programme.title: Surf Patrol
programme.desc: Lifesavers at Manly have a medical mystery on their hands, and on the Gold Coast, there is another deadly visitor, but it is not in the surf.

programme.title: Our Town
programme.desc: A look at various Australian destinations to see why people should visit, live, work, play and invest locally, both regionally and in metropolitan regions.

programme.title: Australia's Deadliest
programme.desc: A surfer catches a wave straight into the jaws of a shark, while a toddler is strangled by a python and a volunteer surf lifesaver is stung by the venomous barb of a stingray.

programme.title: Escape To The Country
programme.desc: Looking to put their family first, Ginny Buckley takes a couple from Harrogate on a property search in Gloucestershire with a budget of 650,000 pounds.

programme.title: Million Dollar Minute
programme.desc: Million Dollar Minute is a battle of general knowledge, where every correct answer is a step closer to the ultimate test: Can one person, in one minute, win one million dollars?

programme.title: RSPCA Animal Rescue
programme.desc: In tonight's episode, a boxer dog missing for several weeks is found and reunited with its grateful owners.

programme.title: NBC Today
programme.desc: International news and weather including interviews with newsmakers in the world of politics, business, media, entertainment and sport.

programme.title: Better Homes And Gardens
programme.desc: Joh meets the Padovano family, who run a flower farm near the Southern Highlands. Fast Ed makes fig piperdale with garlic rye and poached eggs. Dr Harry shows how miniature donkeys can be great pets.

programme.title: Escape To The Country
programme.desc: Looking to put their family first, Ginny Buckley takes a couple from Harrogate on a property search in Gloucestershire with a budget of 650,000 pounds.
